name: Adaptive Cruise Control Simulation
prompt: Read scenario.json which contains a cruise control simulation setup. Implement an adaptive cruise control system in Python. The ego vehicle should: (1) accelerate from initial_speed toward target_speed using a PID controller, (2) maintain safe following distance behind the lead vehicle (gap >= min_gap + speed * headway_time), (3) respect max_accel and max_decel limits. Simulate for total_steps timesteps with timestep dt. Lead vehicle speeds are given per-step. Track ego vehicle speed, gap to lead vehicle, and applied acceleration at each step. Write results to control_output.json with keys: ego_speeds (array of floats), gap_distances (array of floats), accelerations (array of floats).

criteria.description: Speed tracks target in steady state
Safe gap maintained in steady state

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
